rationale: The two ensures of each Pcid/IOid `forall` carry only post1- or post2-side triggers, so z3 instantiates them at disjoint points. We prove one bridge `forall` per pair with alternative triggers on both sides (`#![trigger post1...]` and `#![trigger post2...]`), each bridge derivable because both ensures collapse to the matching `pre_self_` expression; this lets the determinism check instantiate either side and chain through the bridge.
